summary: Costa Rica packs extraordinary biodiversity into a small country: volcanoes, cloud forests, Pacific and Caribbean beaches, zip-lines through rainforest canopy, thermal pools beside active volcanoes, and more wildlife per square kilometre than almost anywhere on earth. The Tico 'Pura Vida' lifestyle is infectious.
neighbourhoods: San José (capital, historic centre, museums), Arenal Volcano (national park, hot springs, adventure), Monteverde (cloud forest, zip-lining, resplendent quetzal), Manuel Antonio (beach + jungle, sloths and monkeys), Tamarindo (surf town, Pacific coast, nightlife), Tortuguero (Caribbean coast, sea turtle nesting, canals), Puerto Viejo (Caribbean vibes, reggae, chocolate farms)
must_do: Arenal Volcano hike + La Fortuna waterfall + thermal hot springs, Monteverde cloud forest canopy walk + zip-line, Corcovado National Park wildlife tour (advanced booking), Tortuguero canal tour (jungle boat), Manuel Antonio National Park wildlife walk, surf lessons in Tamarindo, sea turtle watching (July-October), white water rafting Pacuare River
transport_tips: Renting a 4WD is highly recommended for flexibility (roads often rough). Domestic flights (Sansa or Sky) connect regions quickly. Shuttle services popular for tourists. Public buses very cheap but slow. Taxis: use official red taxis with TAXI on top and meter (María). Uber operates in San José. Driving: right side, roads can be poor.
safety_notes: Generally safe for tourists but petty theft common in San José and beach towns - keep valuables secure. Swimming: many beaches have dangerous rip currents - check conditions. Crocodiles in some estuaries - follow warning signs. Sun protection essential. Insects: bring DEET repellent for jungle areas. Travel insurance essential.
budget_notes: Budget: $80-120 AUD/day. Mid-range: $160-250 AUD/day. Luxury: $300+ AUD/day. Casado (local plate) $8-12 AUD. Restaurant $25-45 AUD. Zip-line tour $60-90 AUD. Guided national park tour $40-80 AUD. Accommodation from $20 (hostel) to $300+ (eco-lodge).

sample_day_blocks.activity: La Fortuna Waterfall swim + free time
Tabacon or Baldi hot springs with volcano views
